title: Want Safe Income? This Stock Raised Its Dividend in the Last 4 Recessions
text: Dividend stocks are one simple way investors can generate passive income. Dividend stocks that consistently raise their payouts can be a trustworthy source of income.

title: This S&P 500 Stock Is a Blue Chip Bargain
text: Asset manager T. Rowe Price has a historically high 4.3% dividend yield.

title: 4-Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Sour Month
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio was launched on November 1st, 2022, and despite a poor start to April the long term return is still attractive. The portfolio outperformed the S&P 500 Total Return by 29 bps during the month of March.

title: Dividend Income Summary: Lanny's March 2023 Summary
text: In March, we (my wife and I) received a dividend income total of $5,707.34. Target, Lockheed Martin and T. Rowe Price are 3 dividend growth stocks that sent massive dividend payments our way, all over $100 and even all over $125 each.

title: T. Rowe Price Group Should Be On Your Watchlist
text: Shares of T. Rowe are trading more than 25% below their 52 weeks high. T. Rowe's funds have shown strong performance over the long term.

title: Blue Chip Bargain: Buy This Dividend Stock and Relax
text: T. Rowe Price's asset management business is under pressure today, but that's to be expected. The company has a long history of rewarding investors with dividends and a historically high yield.

title: DivHut Portfolio Update: March 2023
text: The system is clearly broken, and has been for a while; however, I could find comfort in one thing, my dividends. Four figures in a month is a win in my book. Earning $1,893.81 represents 12.6% year over year increase in passive income.

title: 4 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For April + 2 To Watch
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." - Kiplinger.com/Investing. 67 Aristocrats, screened as of April 5, 2023, represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated top ten net gains ranged from 14.14%-42.97% topped by SWK & VFC.
